prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade utilizing a **Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA** (62mm, 66lb/min) with billet compressor wheel and titanium nitride coating, paired with a **BMW S63T4 (441 kW/600 PS) engine** custom turbo manifold by **Dorst Engineering** (304 stainless steel, equal-length runners, TIG-welded) and **TurboSmart 45mm wastegates** for precise boost control at 2.2 bar (32 psi) peak pressure. Supporting mods include a **Vargas GC Stage 2+ hybrid turbo kit** (compatible with stock internals) and a **Motec M150 ECU** with **BMW Motorsport S63T4-specific calibration** for optimized ignition timing and fueling under high-load conditions.

Full **Dinan Engineering** S63T4-specific cooling system overhaul: **Dinan CNC-machined aluminum radiator** (dual-core, 40% increased capacity), **PWR Performance intercooler** (bar-and-plate, 1200hp-rated), **Mishimoto silicone hoses** (multi-layer, reinforced with aramid fiber), and **Dinan oil cooler** (front-mount, 19-row) with **Mocal thermostatic oil bypass valve** to maintain oil temps below 100°C under track conditions. Additional **Gintani S63T4-specific heat exchanger** for optimized water-to-air cooling efficiency.

Drivetrain reinforcement with **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (2-way, 45/90% lockup) in the **ZF 8HP76 XShift** transmission, paired with a **South Bend Clutch Stage 3 Daily** (ceramic-metallic, 1200hp-rated) and **Drexler Motorsport differential cover** (aluminum, finned, with integrated oil cooler ports). Suspension upgrades include **Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (3-way adjustable, 800lb/in front springs, 1000lb/in rear springs) with **H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear sway bars**, **034 Motorsport subframe reinforcement kit**, and **AP Racing 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers** with **380mm two-piece rotors** (floating, slotted, and cryo-treated).
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (Pandem Design, carbon fiber, 50mm front/70mm rear fender flares) with **custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** (Xpel Stealth PPF on high-impact areas) and **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 21" forged wheels** (ET25 front, ET30 rear, 9.5J/12J widths) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (275/30 R21 front, 325/30 R21 rear).

**RK Carbon GT wing** (3D-printed carbon fiber, 1800mm span, 300mm chord, adjustable angle of attack up to 20°) mounted on **custom RK Carbon GT-spec rear diffuser** (integrated brake ducts, 3D-printed ABS with carbon weave overlay) and **RK Carbon front splitter** (adjustable dive planes, 3-stage Gurney flap). Additional aero includes **Eventuri S63T4 carbon fiber intake system** (visible through custom carbon fiber hood scoop) and **Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system** (dual 100mm tips, quad-resonator delete, titanium valves).

**BMW M Performance Carbon Fiber Engine Cover** (painted in **Frozen Brilliant White**) with **custom laser-etched S63T4 engine code** (red anodized aluminum plaque), **RK Carbon GT-spec side skirts** (integrated LED turn signals, carbon fiber weave), and **Lux H8 V4 Angel Eyes** (RGBW, 8000K, 3000-lumen output) with **Morimoto XB LED fog lights** (5500K, 30W CREE LEDs). Interior upgrades include **Recaro SPG XL seats** (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara/leather, 6-point Schroth harnesses), **MCS Motorsport bolt-in roll cage** (T45 steel, 6-point, powder-coated matte black), and **Aim Solo 2 DL GPS data logger** with **BMW M8-specific CAN bus integration**.
